MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ERICA PHILLIPS' Motion And Hearing Re: Opening Brief Of Petitioner Erica Phillips In Support Of Alternative Writ Of Mandate.

Petitioner's petition for writ of administrative mandamus is denied.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
